label: 深空POI放置器
description: 根据密度权重图在平坦地面上密度加权放置100+种POI兴趣点，高密度区极度拥挤形成迷宫感道路，低密度区稀疏空旷，输出每种POI的单值掩码网格列表及道路网格。
description-en: Density-weighted placement of 100+ POI types on flat terrain using a density field; high-density areas create maze-like corridors, low-density areas feel open. Outputs per-type mask grids and a road grid.
icon: 深色方形地图上密集散布大量彩色小方块标记，部分区域极度密集留出细窄通道，部分区域空旷，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: groundGrid
inputs.label: 地面底图
inputs.description: 全1地面网格，来自 deeper_density_field 的 groundGrid 输出
inputs.description-en: All-1 ground grid from deeper_density_field's groundGrid output.

inputs.name: densityGrid
inputs.label: 密度权重图
inputs.description: 密度权重网格（0–100），来自 deeper_density_field 的 densityGrid 输出
inputs.description-en: Density weight grid (0–100) from deeper_density_field's densityGrid output.

inputs.name: poiList
inputs.label: POI清单
inputs.description: POI规则数组，格式：[{name, count, minDist}] 或简化格式 [{名称: count}] 或 [{名称: count:minDist}]
inputs.description-en: POI rules array: [{name, count, minDist}] or simplified [{name: count}] or [{name: 'count:minDist'}].

inputs.name: globalMinDist
inputs.label: 全局最小间距
inputs.description: 所有 POI 之间的全局最小格子间距（包含不同种类之间），越小 POI 越密集
inputs.description-en: Global minimum cell distance between any two POIs across all types; smaller = denser.

inputs.name: densityInfluence
inputs.label: 密度影响权重
inputs.description: 密度场对放置概率的影响程度：0=完全均匀随机，1=完全跟随密度场
inputs.description-en: How much density field influences placement probability: 0 = uniform random, 1 = fully density-driven.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间自动随机

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: POI网格列表
outputs.description: 每种 POI 的单值掩码网格列表（number[][][]），与 outputNameList 一一对应
outputs.description-en: List of single-value mask grids per POI type (number[][][]); aligned 1:1 with outputNameList.

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: POI名称清单
outputs.description: 与 outputGridList 一一对应的名称清单，格式 [{id, name}]
outputs.description-en: Name list aligned 1:1 with outputGridList: [{id, name}].

outputs.name: roadGrid
outputs.label: 道路网格
outputs.description: 地面底图中未被任何 POI 覆盖的区域（值=1），POI 覆盖区域为0；道路由 POI 自然挤压形成
outputs.description-en: Areas not covered by any POI (value=1), covered areas=0; roads emerge naturally from POI compression.

outputs.name: mergedGrid
outputs.label: 合并网格
outputs.description: 所有 POI 写入同一张网格，每种 POI 使用唯一 id，道路格子保持值1
outputs.description-en: All POIs merged into a single grid with unique ids per type; road cells retain value 1.

outputs.name: placedCount
outputs.label: 放置总数
outputs.description: 所有种类 POI 成功放置的总格子数
outputs.description-en: Total number of POI cells successfully placed across all types.
